pages.text: This weapon was the downfall of an entire intergalactic civilization.$(br2)$(3)$(l)Special:$() Applies Cosmic Plague V to enemies for 1 minute on hit. It spreads to nearby entities not wearing a Cosmic Plague armor set (at a lower level).$(br)This includes you.
Combine Blight and a Cosmic Plague Spore in a Totem Lathe.
